title: Lenvatinib plus pembrolizumab in participants with advanced or recurrent endometrial cancer: Study 309/KEYNOTE-775 and ENGOT-en9/LEAP-001 post-(neo)adjuvant therapy outcomes.
abstract: We report outcomes for the sub-group of participants who only received neoadjuvant, adjuvant, or neoadjuvant+adjuvant platinum-based chemotherapy before enrollment in the phase 3 Study 309/KEYNOTE-775 (NCT03517449) and ENGOT-en9/LEAP-001 (NCT03884101).
